Operation 'get_products' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, not_actionable. Original summary 'Product Search' is too generic and not action-oriented. Description lacks clarity on what inputs are expected, what the operation returns, and how results should be used. Added specific search methods supported, clarified the ~20 attribute subset returned, explained the relationship to the Fetch API, and noted parameter count for AI agent understanding of available filtering options.

data.current_description: Content1 Search API will allow you to search using free text, category code, or advanced search options. The advanced search and filters can be used to narrow the numbers of products which are returned.  The full list of available parameters which can be used to search or filter can be found by clicking on the corresponding hyperlink in the query paramter below.
data.summary_suggestion: Search products by text, category, or advanced filters
data.description_suggestion: Searches the Content1 Repository for products matching specified criteria. Supports free text search, category code filtering, and advanced search options to narrow results. Returns a pre-defined subset of approximately 20 product attributes per result, sufficient for product selection. Use the itemReferenceId from results to fetch complete product details via the Product Fetch API. Accepts 14 query parameters for search and filtering options.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Product Search' is too generic and not action-oriented. Description lacks clarity on what inputs are expected, what the operation returns, and how results should be used. Added specific search methods supported, clarified the ~20 attribute subset returned, explained the relationship to the Fetch API, and noted parameter count for AI agent understanding of available filtering options.

message: Operation 'get_products_itemReferenceId' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, inconsistent_terminology. Original summary 'Product Fetch' is too generic. Description has typos ('contianed', 'relavent'), unclear terminology ('playlist' for attrset), and missing clarity on required vs optional parameters. Added explicit mention of required itemReferenceId parameter, clarified the optional attrset/playlist parameter, explained the benefit of filtering, and specified what is returned. Improved consistency with domain terminology and AI agent understanding of parameter requirements.

data.current_description: The fetch API is used to return the full set of attributes for the product.Use the ItemReferenceId returned from the search to fetch that product.  You can pass a playlist in the attrset field to limit the number of attributes returned that are relavent to your systems needs, reducing processing time and bandwidth.
data.summary_suggestion: Fetch complete product attributes by item reference
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete set of product attributes from the Content1 Repository for a specific product. Requires the itemReferenceId path parameter obtained from a Product Search result. Optionally accepts an attrset parameter (referred to as a playlist) to limit returned attributes to those relevant to your system, reducing processing time and bandwidth. Returns the full product information object with all available attributes or filtered subset as specified.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Product Fetch' is too generic. Description has typos ('contianed', 'relavent'), unclear terminology ('playlist' for attrset), and missing clarity on required vs optional parameters. Added explicit mention of required itemReferenceId parameter, clarified the optional attrset/playlist parameter, explained the benefit of filtering, and specified what is returned. Improved consistency with domain terminology and AI agent understanding of parameter requirements.
